ChatRequest.description:
Request model for posting a Slack message.

Immutable model with all fields required to send a chat message.

Attributes:
    workspace_name: Slack workspace name
    channel: Channel name to post to
    text: Message text
    thread_ts: Optional thread timestamp for replies
    icon_emoji: Emoji to use as the message icon
    icon_url: URL to an image to use as the message icon
    username: Bot username to display
    secret: Secret reference for Slack bot token

icon_emoji.description: Emoji to use as the message icon (e.g., ':robot_face:')
icon_emoji.title: Icon Emoji

icon_url.description: URL to an image to use as the message icon
icon_url.title: Icon Url

secret.description: Secret reference for Slack bot token

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest

ChatResponse.description:
Response model for a posted Slack message.

Immutable model returning the Slack API response fields.

Attributes:
    ts: Message timestamp
    channel: Channel ID where the message was posted
    thread_ts: Thread timestamp if this was a threaded reply

channel.description: Channel ID where the message was posted
channel.title: Channel

thread_ts.description: Thread timestamp if this was a threaded reply
thread_ts.title: Thread Ts

ChatResponse.title: ChatResponse

GithubOrgDesiredState.description:
Desired owner state for a single GitHub organization.

Attributes:
    org_name: GitHub organization name
    token: Vault secret reference for the org's GitHub API token
    base_url: GitHub API base URL (override for GitHub Enterprise)
    owners: Desired set of lowercase GitHub usernames that should be org admins

base_url.description: GitHub API base URL (override for GitHub Enterprise)
base_url.title: Base Url

owners.description: Desired set of GitHub usernames that should be org admins
owners.title: Owners

token.description: Vault secret reference for the GitHub API token

GithubOrgDesiredState.title: GithubOrgDesiredState

GithubOwnerActionAddOwner.description:
Action: Add a user as an org admin (owner).

Note: Owner removal is intentionally NOT supported. The integration only
adds owners and never removes them, preserving the behavior of the original
github-owners reconcile integration. This is a deliberate safety decision —
removing org admins is a high-impact operation that requires explicit manual
review rather than automated removal.

username.description: GitHub username to add as org admin
username.title: Username

GithubOwnerActionAddOwner.title: GithubOwnerActionAddOwner

GithubOwnersReconcileRequest.description:
Request model for github-owners reconciliation.

POST requests always queue a background task and return immediately
with a task_id. Use GET /reconcile/{task_id} to retrieve the result.

dry_run.description: If True, only calculate actions without executing. Default: True (safety first!)
dry_run.title: Dry Run

organizations.description: List of GitHub organizations with their desired owner membership
organizations.title: Organizations

GithubOwnersReconcileRequest.title: GithubOwnersReconcileRequest

GithubOwnersTaskResponse.description:
Response model for POST /reconcile endpoint.

Returned immediately when the task is queued. Contains task_id and
status_url for retrieving the result via GET request.

status_url.description: URL to retrieve task result (GET request)
status_url.title: Status Url

GithubOwnersTaskResponse.title: GithubOwnersTaskResponse

GithubOwnersTaskResult.description:
Result model for a completed github-owners reconciliation task.

Returned by GET /reconcile/{task_id}.

actions.description: All actions calculated (desired - current), including any that failed to apply.
actions.title: Actions

applied_actions.description: Actions that were successfully applied (non-dry-run only).
applied_actions.title: Applied Actions

applied_count.description: Number of actions actually applied (0 if dry_run=True)
applied_count.title: Applied Count

errors.description: List of errors encountered during reconciliation
errors.title: Errors

GithubOwnersTaskResult.title: GithubOwnersTaskResult

info.description: REST API for qontract-reconcile api integrations
info.title: Qontract API

get.description:
Get members of an LDAP group.

Fetches members from the internal groups proxy API using OAuth2
client-credentials authentication. Results are cached for performance.

Args:
    group_name: LDAP group name
    cache: Cache dependency
    secret_manager: Secret manager dependency
    secret: LdapSecret with OAuth2 connection details and client_secret reference

Returns:
    LdapGroupMembersResponse with list of group members

Raises:
    HTTPException:
        - 500 Internal Server Error: If the internal groups API call fails

parameters.description: Base URL of the internal groups API
parameters.name: base_url

schema.description: Base URL of the internal groups API
schema.title: Base Url

get.description:
Get users in a PagerDuty escalation policy.

Fetches all users across all escalation rules in the policy.
Results are cached for performance (TTL configured in settings).

Args:
    policy_id: PagerDuty escalation policy ID
    instance: PagerDuty instance name

Returns:
    EscalationPolicyUsersResponse with list of users

Raises:
    HTTPException:
        - 500 Internal Server Error: If PagerDuty API call fails

Example:
    GET /api/v1/external/pagerduty/escalation-policies/XYZ789/users?instance=app-sre
    Response:
    {
        "users": [
            {"username": "jsmith"},
            {"username": "mdoe"}
        ]
    }

Get users currently on-call in a PagerDuty schedule.

Fetches users from the specified schedule using a time window of now + 60 seconds.
Results are cached for performance (TTL configured in settings).

Args:
    schedule_id: PagerDuty schedule ID
    instance: PagerDuty instance name

Returns:
    ScheduleUsersResponse with list of users

Raises:
    HTTPException:
        - 500 Internal Server Error: If PagerDuty API call fails

Example:
    GET /api/v1/external/pagerduty/schedules/ABC123/users?instance=app-sre
    Response:
    {
        "users": [
            {"username": "jsmith"},
            {"username": "mdoe"}
        ]
    }

post.description:
Post a message to a Slack channel.

Sends a chat message to the specified channel in the given workspace.
Supports threaded replies via thread_ts.

Args:
    request: Chat request with channel, text, and credentials

Returns:
    ChatResponse with ts, channel, and optional thread_ts

Raises:
    HTTPException:
        - 502 Bad Gateway: If Slack API call fails

get.description:
Get OWNERS file data from a Git repository.

Fetches OWNERS file approvers and reviewers from GitHub or GitLab repositories.
Results are cached for performance (TTL configured in settings).

Args:
    params: VCSQueryParams with repo_url, owners_file, ref, and secret reference

Returns:
    RepoOwnersResponse with provider type, approvers, and reviewers lists

Raises:
    HTTPException:
        - 500 Internal Server Error: If VCS API call fails or tokens not found

Example:
    GET /api/v1/external/vcs/repos/owners?url=https://github.com/openshift/osdctl&path=/&ref=master
    Response:
    {
        "provider": "github",
        "approvers": ["github_user1", "github_user2"],
        "reviewers": ["github_user3"]
    }

parameters.description: Path to OWNERS file in the repository (e.g., /OWNERS or /path/to/OWNERS)
parameters.name: owners_file

schema.description: Path to OWNERS file in the repository (e.g., /OWNERS or /path/to/OWNERS)
schema.title: Owners File

post.description:
Queue a GitHub owners reconciliation task.

This endpoint always queues a background task and returns immediately
with a task_id. Use GET /reconcile/{task_id} to retrieve the result.

Args:
    reconcile_request: Reconciliation request with desired owner state
    current_user: Authenticated user (from JWT token)
    request: FastAPI Request object (used to generate status_url)

Returns:
    GithubOwnersTaskResponse with task_id and status_url

get.description:
Retrieve the reconciliation result (blocking or non-blocking).

**Non-blocking mode (default):** Returns immediate status (pending/success/failed)
**Blocking mode (with timeout):** Waits up to timeout seconds, returns 408 if still pending

Args:
    task_id: Task ID from POST /reconcile response
    current_user: Authenticated user (from JWT token)
    timeout: Maximum seconds to wait (default: None = non-blocking)

Returns:
    GithubOwnersTaskResult with status, actions, applied_count, and errors

Raises:
    HTTPException:
        - 404 Not Found: Task ID not found
        - 408 Request Timeout: Task still pending after timeout (blocking mode only)

parameters.description: Optional: Block up to N seconds for completion. Omit for immediate status check.
parameters.name: timeout

schema.description: Optional: Block up to N seconds for completion. Omit for immediate status check.
schema.title: Timeout
